name: Greek New Year's Cake - Xwcg89a
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 325°F. Position the rack in the center.
Grease and flour a 10 x 4 inch tube pan with unsalted butter.
Using an electric mixer, cream together the butter and sugar until fluffy.
Gradually beat in the egg yolks, whole eggs, water, and vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, combine the flour and salt.
Gradually mix the dry ingredients into the butter mixture (the batter will be very thick).
Using clean, dry beaters, beat the egg whites with salt until soft peaks form.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon sugar and beat until stiff but not dry.
Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter.
Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Press a coin into the cake.
Sprinkle with almonds and sesame seeds.
Bake for about 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
Cool completely in the pan on a rack. Run a knife around the edge of the pan to loosen the cake.
Invert onto a plate. (The cake can be prepared up to one day ahead. Wrap tightly and store at room temperature.)
